title: VehicleLeadRequest
description: Typed AAP request for the `lead.vehicle` skill. Vehicle-specific inquiry; designed to be losslessly mappable to ADF/XML so that legacy dealer CRMs can ingest it directly. The `vehicles` array MUST contain at least one vehicle reference (vin / stock / vehicle_id, or year+make+model). When `customer` is present, `consent` is REQUIRED with scope including `vehicle_inquiry`. Carried inside an A2A `Message.parts[].data` DataPart via the `SendMessage` operation.

vehicles.description: Vehicles the user is interested in. At minimum one identifier (VIN, stock, vehicle_id) or year+make+model trio.

intent.description: Purchase intent. Mapped to ADF '<vehicle interest>' attribute.

finance_type.description: Optional financing preference. Mapped to ADF '<finance><method>'.

customer.description: Customer contact info. When present, 'consent' MUST also be present.

consent.description: Required whenever 'customer' is present. Scope MUST include 'vehicle_inquiry'.

source_agent.description: Identifier of the buyer agent submitting the lead.

submitted_at.description: Buyer-agent timestamp at submission. Mapped to ADF '<requestdate>'.
